title: alyssum pyrenaicum
intro: Alyssum pyrenaicum, also known as Pyrenean madwort, is a perennial plant belonging to the family Boraginaceae. Traditionally, it has been used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Alyssum pyrenaicum are attributed to its ability to soothe skin irritations, reduce swelling, and promote wound healing. It is often used in herbal preparations such as infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, making it a valuable addition to traditional remedies for various health issues.
